enrichment method: immunoprecipitated endogenous, GFP-tagged BUB-1 from embryo lysates using a GFP nanobody.
fractionation method: Samples were run on 4–12% Bis–Tris sodium dodecyl sulfate gels
instrument: coupled with a Q-Exactive Plus Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: Sample was transferred to mass spectrometer via an Easy-Spray source
reduction reagent: Samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT in 20 mM ammonium bicarbonate.
reduction concentration: Samples were reduced with 10 mM DTT
